title: tragacantha gebleri
intro: Tragacantha gebleri, also known as the Russian thistle or Silybum marianum, is a plant species native to Europe and Asia. It is a thistle-like plant used in traditional medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties in treating liver and gallbladder disorders due to its high content of silymarin. The health benefits of Tragacantha gebleri include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and hepatoprotective properties, making it effective in reducing liver damage and improving overall liver function. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha gebleri often come in the form of capsules or tablets, as well as teas and infusions, which are used to treat various conditions including liver cirrhosis, jaundice, and hepatitis.
